name: Inventory Page Overview
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The "},{"text":"Inventory page","bold":true},{"text":" offers a centralized view of all product SKUs and their current stock levels across multiple warehouses or fulfillment locations. This helps businesses "},{"text":"track availability","bold":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"monitor stock movement","bold":true},{"text":", and "},{"text":"manage reservations","bold":true},{"text":" efficiently."}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"To access "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Go to Inventory >> table."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"By selecting "},{"text":"‘Edit’","bold":true},{"text":" from the "},{"text":"3-dot (⋮) Actions menu","bold":true},{"text":" next to the item."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"At the top of the page, you'll see a summary of the specific product variant you're editing. This helps you quickly confirm which product variant you're managing. This includes:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"SKU","bold":true},{"text":": Unique identifier for the variant (e.g., NK1512_210)"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Size","bold":true},{"text":": Variant size label (e.g., XS)"}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/HEQ2OEL8F77P/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/HEQ2OEL8F77P/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":2315578,"width":2560,"height":1440,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FHEQ2OEL8F77P%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":1383,"dateInserted":"2025-11-03T09:59:05+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"\n"},{"text":"Associated Variant Panel","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On the right-hand side, under "},{"text":"Associated Variant","bold":true},{"text":", the currently selected variant (e.g., XS) is shown. You can click on this option to view and edit other variants.
